race.comment: RATTLE'N'ROLL (1) has been in the market at his last couple of runs since resuming but failed to threaten, the latest effort a modest ninth at Kilmore over 1200m. This looks easier than those races though and he draws much more favourably than last start. TOUXLOVE (2) didn't make an impact at his last run before going for a spell on February 3, finishing ninth and beaten 7 lengths over 1600m at Seymour. Yet to win first up but generally runs well with two minor placings from three tries and strikes a highly-winnable race. PRANDIUM TEMPUS (3) was a nice maiden winner first up and although well beaten at the next two, they were in stronger races than this, so an improved run expected. O'REG (6) is an 11yo well past his best but has run well here before and strikes the right contest to run the best race of the campaign. CILENTO (8) is experiencing a long win drought, extended last start when ninth over 1300m at Echuca, but shouldn't be wanting for fitness now.
